steps.t: Oskari is somewhere among the camps of the Rauta-lehmä at Fashat Laug in the eastern North Downs. Iivari has given you a message to take to his brothe…
Iivari is in the Suuri-lehmä encampment, west of Fashat Laug. Oskari refused his brother's plea and gave you a rune to take back to Iivari.
